---
title: "Hi, I'm Bansi Khachar"
---

::::: {.columns style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;"}

::: {.column width="100%" style="text-align: center;"}
![](images/IMG_7286%202-2.jpg){.rounded-circle style="border-radius: 50%; width: 150px; height: 160px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;"}
:::

:::::

## About Me

I’ve always been curious about the story behind the numbers — why people click, leave, or convert. That curiosity led me to marketing analytics, where data becomes a way to understand real human behavior.

Originally from India, I moved to California to pursue my MS in Digital Marketing and Analytics at Cal Poly Pomona. That journey shaped how I think about consumers, culture, and decision-making.

Today, I focus on turning data into strategy — analyzing funnels, building attribution models, and designing surveys that uncover not just what is happening, but why it matters.


## Education 
- California State Polytechnic University, Pomona  
  **Master of Science in Digital Marketing and Analytics** - 2026
  
- Ahmedabad University, India  
  **Bachelor of Business Administrations (Honors)**  - 2024
  *Major in Marketing*

## Experience

- **Data Analyst Assistant** - Jun 2025 - Present  
  *Associated Students Inc., CPP* - *Pomona*

- **Web Assistant** - Apr 2025 - Present  
  *Cal Poly Pomona Enterprises* - *Pomona*

- **Digital Marketing Intern** - Sep 2024 - May 2025  
  *Trauma Resource Institute* - *Claremont*

- **Marketing Intern** - Aug 2023 - Dec 2023  
  *Balaji Wafers Pvt Ltd* - *India*

## Let's Connect

Good work starts with good conversations.

You can [email me](mailto:bansikhachar@gmail.com) or connect on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bansikhachar29/).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
